'''Pepin''' was the navigation officer of one of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He, along with [[Erv Lekauf]], helped [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] quell a [[Skirmish aboard ST 321|mutiny]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] onboard the shuttle, led by the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Sheyvan]]. Pepin was able to survive the engagement.<ref name="Edged" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pepin's name was inspired to author [[Karen Traviss]] by Quebec ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan [[Dany Pépin]], former admin of SithClan.Net, creator of the ''Star Wars En Direct'' web radio talk-show, and producer/director of the Karen Traviss' ''[[Omega Squad: Targets]]'' audio drama.
